top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for June 15, 2026
top_signals.summary: US equity-index futures jump after the US and Iran reached an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Contracts on the S&P 500 Index are up 1.3% at 7:45 a.m. in New York.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Failed SpaceX IPO Allocation Prompts Korea to Widen Mirae Review
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s financial watchdog has expanded an inspection of Mirae Asset Securities Co. to examine the brokerage’s failure to secure an allocation of SpaceX shares in the company’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham commits to triple lock despite backlash over ‘unsustainable’ policy
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham has committed to keeping the triple lock pension and allowing pensioners to escape paying income taxes despite the policy being opposed by swathes of economists and MPs.  Burnham said he would keep the triple lock pension, the mechanism that ensures the taxpayer-funded state pension rises by whichever is highest out of wage growth, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on Wall Street’s blockchain challenger
top_signals.summary: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
